reason: All acceptance criteria verified. Telegram uses SHA256(bot_token) as HMAC key. LINE uses HMAC-SHA256+Base64. verify_signature FastAPI dependency returns 401 AUTH_INVALID_SIGNATURE on failure. hmac.compare_digest() used for constant-time comparison. VERIFIERS dict supports TELEGRAM, LINE, MESSENGER, WHATSAPP with extensible register(). All 8/8 tests pass. Coverage 100%. Timing attack resistance confirmed.
